import React, { useState } from 'react' import { AMT_CONFIRM_BTN_TEXT, AMT_PLACEHOLDER } from '../constants' import useSplitPaymentStore from '../useSplitPaymentStore' function TotalAmount() { const { setTotalAmount, totalAmount } = useSplitPaymentStore((s) => s) const [inputVal, setInputVal] = useState(totalAmount) return (
setInputVal(e.target.value)} />
) } export default TotalAmount
